# .github

## Purpose
Container for GitHub-specific configuration — currently only CI workflow files.

## Subdirectories
| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | GitHub Actions CI definitions — see `workflows/AGENTS.md` |

## For AI Agents

### Working In This Directory
- If you add issue/PR templates, place them at `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` or `.github/pull_request_template.md`.
- Do not add custom workflows that duplicate `ci.yml` — extend the existing one instead.

## Dependencies
None.
